items.title: Boy, 15, shot dead in France as prosecutors blame drug war
items.dek: Prosecutors in Nantes say the shooting was drug-related, but the victim's aunt says he was not involved.
items.body: Prosecutors in Nantes say the shooting was drug-related, but the victim's aunt says he was not involved.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Australia court doubles payout for trans woman in landmark discrimination case
items.dek: Roxanne Tickle has been awarded AU$40,000 in damages for being kicked off the Giggle for Girls app.
items.body: Roxanne Tickle has been awarded AU$40,000 in damages for being kicked off the Giggle for Girls app.
